history_limit.hint: ElymBot conversation history is capped by the host; 100 is the current documented maximum.

min_messages.hint: The plugin will refuse to call the model when fewer valid messages are available.

max_tokens.hint: Raise this if the report is truncated.

tone.hint: Controls the style of the LLM analysis.
tone.default: 中文，简洁但有梗，避免攻击个人隐私。
